title: poa douglasii subsp. macrantha
intro: Poa douglasii subsp. macrantha, also known as tall bluegrass, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Poa douglasii subsp. macrantha include its ability to reduce swelling, soothe skin irritations, and aid in digestion. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves and roots, which can be used to treat various health issues.
